subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet We have revealed unto one of the handmaidens of God, that it may detach her from all else save Him and draw her near unto the Dawning-Place of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح قد نزلناه لامه من اماء الله لینقطعها عما سواه و یقربها الی مطلع الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
